changeSet.author: copilot
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_feedback_session_logs_student_session_type_timestamp ON feedback_session_logs (student_id, session_id, feedback_session_log_type, timestamp DESC);

changeSet.author: copilot
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_feedback_session_logs_timestamp ON feedback_session_logs (timestamp);
